subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Time and again hast thou attained unto the hearing of the Call of God, and the Tablets of God have been sent down from the heaven of mercy especially for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی کره بعد کره باصغای ندای حق فائز شدی و الواح الله از سماء رحمت مخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
